items.name: Kron
items.description: The local currency. Spend it wisely.

items.name: Groceries
items.description: A bag of basics: bread, something for dinner, a few essentials. Eat at home to restore hunger.

items.name: Energy Drink
items.description: A slim silver can that promises more than it probably delivers. Restores some energy.

items.name: Pool Job
items.description: Application accepted. You're on the cleaning rota at the municipal swimming pool.

items.name: Laptop
items.description: A mid-range laptop. Fast enough for anything you'd actually use it for.

items.name: Headphones
items.description: Over-ear headphones with decent sound isolation.

items.name: Phone Charger
items.description: A universal cable. Because the old one eventually gives out.
